task.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
task.summary: Implement a first-class CodeWiki verification gateway/router before relying on existing verifier evidence to close the stable refactor baseline and start dogfooding.

goal.outcome: Task closure and future sprint/release/drift checks use a robust verification gateway instead of ad hoc verifier prompts or parent-session confidence, using hardened context packs from the view/context-compiler work where needed.
acceptance: Define a `codewiki.verify`-style internal gateway/router contract with profiles, briefs, policies, and verdict schema.
Implement the `task-close` profile first and route `codewiki_task action="close"` through it.
Run deterministic preflight before semantic verification, including task goal fields, linked path existence, evidence/check presence, and view freshness where applicable.
Consume or define a compact verifier context pack instead of relying on ad hoc task prompt assembly.
Invoke semantic verification in a separate fresh read-only process/session/subagent with a complete CodeWiki verifier rubric and compact task brief.
Parse and validate verifier JSON strictly; malformed output returns `block` with evidence.
Add golden or smoke coverage for `pass`, `fail`, `block`, and malformed-output cases.
Ensure verifier cannot mutate canonical truth or generated views; parent remains sole writer for evidence and lifecycle changes.
non_goals: Do not implement all profiles in the first slice beyond contract stubs or documented routing.
Do not make verification depend on ThinkCode or any single runtime.
Do not close baseline refactor tasks using the old weak verifier path.
Do not solve the full sprint/roadmap context compiler in this task.
verification: Run `npm run typecheck` if required by touched TypeScript.
Manually exercise or unit-test `task-close` verifier outcomes for pass/fail/block.
Run `codewiki_state refresh=true` and confirm green health.

recent_evidence.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
recent_evidence.summary: Fixed verifier feedback: deterministic preflight now reads canonical project events for task evidence/check presence, not roadmap event mirror, and strict verifier schema now blocks extra top-level fields. Smoke parser golden cases cover extra-field rejection.

recent_evidence.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
recent_evidence.summary: Fresh verifier fail: The gateway contract, task-close routing, preflight, compact context pack, fresh read-only Pi session, full rubric inclusion, and main parser smoke cases are present. However, the strict verifier schema requirement remains partially unmet because nested issue objects are not rejected when they contain fields outside {severity, summary, evidence?}. For a hardening task whose acceptance explicitly requires strict JSON validation against verdict_schema, this should be fixed before closure.
issues: Verifier JSON validation is still not fully strict for the declared verdict schema: nested issue objects may contain extra fields and still pass validation.
Smoke coverage does not exercise strict rejection of nested schema extras, so the remaining strict-schema gap is not covered.

recent_evidence.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
recent_evidence.summary: Completed strict nested schema hardening: verifier issue objects now reject fields outside severity, summary, and optional evidence; smoke golden tests cover nested extra-field rejection from actual core parser source.

recent_evidence.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
recent_evidence.summary: Completed strict nested schema hardening: verifier issue objects now reject fields outside severity, summary, and optional evidence; smoke golden tests cover nested extra-field rejection from actual core parser source.

recent_evidence.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
recent_evidence.summary: Fresh verifier pass: Acceptance is satisfied: the task-close verifier contract, preflight, compact context pack consumption, fresh read-only Pi SDK verifier session, strict JSON parser with malformed/block behavior, parent-only lifecycle writes, and smoke coverage for pass/fail/block/malformed/schema cases are implemented and evidenced. Required npm test/typecheck evidence is current, and prior task evidence records codewiki_state refresh=true with green health.

recent_evidence.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
recent_evidence.summary: Closed TASK-040 after verifier gateway hardening satisfied fresh verifier feedback: core/adapter split, deterministic preflight, canonical evidence source, view freshness, full rubric prompt, strict top-level and nested schema validation, and behavioral smoke coverage.

recent_evidence.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
recent_evidence.summary: TASK-040 closed. Verifier gateway hardening passed fresh verifier and local checks.

recent_evidence.title: Checkpoint stable refactor baseline before next roadmap
recent_evidence.summary: After TASK-040 closure and push, resume dogfood baseline checkpoint next.

verdict_policy: Observability signals inform review only; verification gateway decides pass/fail/block.
